brand_identity.name: Genesys Info X
brand_identity.tagline: Engineering the Future Through AI, Cloud & Innovation
brand_identity.tone: Ultra-modern, Corporate Luxury, Authoritative, Innovative, Global
brand_identity.target_audience: Enterprise decision-makers, Global partners, Top-tier tech talent

buttons.primary: bg-neon-green text-black font-bold px-8 py-4 rounded-none hover:bg-neon-green/90 transition-all uppercase tracking-wider text-sm clip-path-polygon-[0_0,100%_0,100%_80%,90%_100%,0_100%]
buttons.secondary: bg-transparent border border-gold text-gold hover:bg-gold/10 px-8 py-4 rounded-none transition-all uppercase tracking-wider text-sm
buttons.ghost: text-white hover:text-neon-green transition-colors uppercase tracking-widest text-xs

cards.service_card: group relative bg-white/5 border border-white/10 p-8 hover:border-neon-green/50 transition-all duration-500 overflow-hidden
cards.ecosystem_card: bg-gradient-to-br from-gray-900 to-black border border-gold/20 p-10 relative

visual_enhancers.gold_divider: h-[1px] w-full bg-gradient-to-r from-transparent via-gold/50 to-transparent

hero.headline: Engineering the Future
hero.description: Genesys Info X is a global technology and consulting powerhouse delivering Enterprise AI, Cloud Architecture, DevOps, and Green Energy solutions.

services.title: AI & Machine Learning
services.desc: Predictive modeling, NLP, and generative AI solutions for enterprise scale.

services.title: Cloud & DevOps
services.desc: Scalable cloud architecture and automated CI/CD pipelines.

services.title: Blockchain Solutions
services.desc: Secure, decentralized ledger technologies for fintech and supply chain.

services.title: Enterprise Software
services.desc: Custom ERP, CRM, and mission-critical software development.

services.title: Green Energy (Genesys Green X)
services.desc: Sustainability-focused technology solutions and energy management.

services.title: Workforce Development
services.desc: Bridging the gap between academia and industry through intense training.

instructions_to_main_agent: Implement a 'Lenis' smooth scroll wrapper for the entire application.
Use 'framer-motion' for all entrance animations (Fade up, stagger children).
Ensure the 'Neon Green' is used sparingly for impact, not flooding the screen.
Use 'Gold' primarily for borders and thin accents to denote luxury.
The Hero section must be immersive with a dark video or high-quality abstract background.
Cards should use the 'glass_panel' style with a subtle hover glow.
Typography must be responsive: Huge on desktop, readable on mobile.
Do not use standard Shadcn cards; build custom structures using the 'cards' guidelines.

universal_guidelines.design_philosophy: Fusion over Imitation. Emotion First. Content is King.
universal_guidelines.spacing: Use 2-3x more spacing than typical. p-12, p-16, py-24.
universal_guidelines.interaction: Every interaction needs micro-animations. Static = dead.
